experience.label: How it works
experience.title: The Experience
experience.subtitle: Answer a few questions. Receive a reading that names what you already knew.

features.title: Five objects. No right answers.
features.body: A simple space is described to you. Five objects appear in it. You describe what you see, and how you see it.

features.title: A reading that sees through the surface.
features.body: Each object maps to something real. The reading draws from depth psychology and decades of symbolic research.

features.title: It names what you already knew.
features.body: A precise, personal reading. Not generic. Written only for what you described in your own words.

theoryAndResearch.label: What It's Based On
theoryAndResearch.title: Drawn from the work of depth psychologists who believed the psyche speaks in images.
theoryAndResearch.body: The Cube exercise has roots in object relations theory, Jungian symbolism, and decades of research into how the unconscious uses spatial metaphor. The objects you choose, and how you describe them, reveal patterns you live inside but rarely see from the outside.

items.a: The Cube is a symbolic psychological exercise rooted in depth psychology. You imagine a space and describe five objects in it. Each object maps to a dimension of your inner world, and we generate a personal reading based on what you described.

items.q: How long does a reading take?
items.a: Most people spend 5–10 minutes answering the questions. The reading itself is delivered immediately and takes another few minutes to read through.

items.q: Is the reading personalised to what I describe?
items.a: Yes. Every reading is generated from your specific answers. Two people can describe the same object completely differently, and their readings will reflect that difference.
The exercise draws from Jungian symbolism, object relations theory, and 50+ years of depth psychology research, including the work of Jung, Hillman, von Franz, Estés, and Winnicott.

items.q: Can I do more than one reading?
items.a: Yes. With a subscription you get unlimited readings, a post-reading conversation to explore the interpretation further, and a reading history to track patterns over time.

experience_page.title: The Cube
experience_page.description: Describe your space in as much detail as you'd like. Be specific about objects, textures, colors, distances. There are no right answers.
questions: In this space, you see a cube. Describe it in detail.
You also see a ladder. How is it positioned? What does it look like?
There are flowers. Where are they? What kind, and what condition are they in?
You notice an animal. What is it? Where is it, and what is it doing?
Finally, there is a storm. How distant is it? What kind of storm?

generating_page.generatingSubtitle: This is a moment. In a moment, you'll have your reading. Be patient.

results_page.title: What Your Space Reveals
results_page.readingPreview: You've seen enough to know this isn't generic. The full interpretation — all five elements, the pattern, and what it means — is waiting.

dashboard_page.noReadings: No readings yet. Start your first reading.

cube_prompts.cube: What does the cube represent? Describe it fully.
cube_prompts.ladder: What does the ladder represent? Where is it going?
cube_prompts.flowers: What do the flowers represent? Are they thriving or dying?
cube_prompts.animal: What does the animal represent? How is it behaving?
cube_prompts.storm: What does the storm represent? How close is it?
